title: Device Home Screen - Unsupported device
scenario: Unsupported paired devices (e.g., BB Fit, Sync60) are incorrectly displayed in the Poly Studio Mobile app home screen device list
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair an unsupported Bluetooth audio device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync60) with the Android device via system Bluetooth settings.
3. Ensure the unsupported device is connected to the Android device.
4. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
5. Observe the device list displayed on the Home screen.
expected: The unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync60) should NOT appear in the device list on the Home screen, as it is not supported by the Poly Studio Mobile app.
